Mikkel Toivosson has been the Big Brawl champion for a year, and he's spent that time rubbing it in everyone's face. He beat you unfairly—and now it's time for some payback.

Mikkel Toivosson is the current Big Brawl champion, with a well earned reputation for two things: his fighting skill, and his arrogant, abrasive personality. Many in Hoelbrak would love to see this cruel and bullying braggart knocked off his championship throne.
Mina Starling operates a shooting gallery in the shadow of one of the great high roads. Its clockwork mechanisms have been provided by Minister Caudecus, for the benefit of all.

Mina's sending me to watch some Brotherhood agent near Vizunah. Owns a flower shop not too far from headquarters.Name's Yuhwa. Parents are couple of Reisen's grunts. Jade Brotherhood royalty, I guess. Mina's not sure if they're using the shop to keep an eye on our movements or what, but it's my job to find out what she's up to.You ask me, this is just punishment for letting things get out of hand at Wajjun. Hyuk acted on his own and that's not my fault. It was a stupid call but look at where they are now: in the dirt. It's just unfortunate that a couple innocents had to go down with him.Anyway... So far, nothing. Just people buying flowers. Apparently crimson sunflowers are in season.
